data.title: The yield on French 10-year government bonds rose to its highest level since June 2009.
data.description: The yield on French 10-year government bonds rose to its highest level since June 2009, reaching 3.876%, up 8 basis points from the previous day. (Jinshi)

data.title: Backpack founder: The company has not monetized through OTC channels and will re-examine the Sybil attack case.
data.description: Backpack founder Armani Ferrante stated on the X platform that, regarding recent rumors about Backpack, the company has not cashed out through OTC token sales. Previous posts on Discord were merely to assist buyers in finding tokens. Regarding Mad Lads, all users who held Mad Lads before the TGE will retain their Backpack VIP status, while new holders will not, a move designed to align incentives with long-term holders. In addressing Sybil attacks, the goal is to protect retail investors from unfair competition from professional players, but acknowledges that previous vetting processes were too absolute and will continue to review Sybil attack cases. Furthermore, he believes that short-term price and FDV after the TGE are not core metrics for success; the team's incentive mechanisms are deeply tied to token performance, and they are committed to creating long-term value.

data.title: Bank of Japan's Neutral Interest Rate Estimates Suggest Potential for Further Rate Hikes
data.description: The Bank of Japan has released new estimates indicating that Japan's neutral interest rate is between 1.1% and 2.5%, which is higher than the current policy rate of 0.75%. According to NS3.AI, the report highlights that several indicators in the latest estimates suggest a gradual increase in interest rates. The bank noted that this could potentially raise the upper limit of the neutral range, providing more scope for additional rate hikes.

data.title: Machi Big Brother Increases Leverage with $500,000 USDC Deposit
data.description: Machi Big Brother has made a significant move by depositing an additional $500,000 USDC into Hyperliquid. According to NS3.AI, this deposit is aimed at increasing leveraged long positions in Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and HYOE. The most notable position reported is a 25x leveraged long on Ethereum, valued at $6.24 million, with an entry price of $2,062.

data.title: Hong Kong Seeks Central Banks' Participation in Gold Clearing System
data.description: Hong Kong is inviting several central banks with friendly ties to China to join its gold clearing system. According to Ming Pao, this initiative is part of Hong Kong's efforts to establish itself as a major gold trading hub.

data.title: BIT: In the absence of a clear catalyst, Bitcoin is likely to remain range-bound in the short term.
data.description: BIT released a chart today stating that Bitcoin is often categorized into two types of assets: one is an inflation hedge, and the other is a high-beta risk asset that moves in the same direction as tech stocks. Both narratives can explain some of its performance, but they don't fully cover Bitcoin's price logic. In contrast, we prefer to understand Bitcoin from the perspective of liquidity environment and capital flows. Historically, Bitcoin has generally performed stronger during periods of ample liquidity and low funding costs; conversely, its price tends to be under pressure during periods of tightening liquidity, reflecting changes in interest rate expectations and actual capital inflows and outflows. Recently, Bitcoin has shown strong stability. Neither interest rate forecasts nor geopolitical events have had a sustained impact on its price. This reflects, to some extent, that current market participation remains cautious, with trading volume and capital flows not yet showing a clear trend, and Bitcoin's sensitivity to short-term fluctuations in inflation expectations and broader risk appetite has decreased accordingly. After the deep pullback following the surge in Q4 2025, current market positioning has largely returned to normal. In the absence of clear catalysts, Bitcoin is likely to continue its range-bound trading in the short term. However, for investors who understand historical patterns and can position themselves when news events are frequent but actual volatility remains low, such an environment still presents opportunities.

data.title: Institutions: The Bank of Japan's latest forecasts indicate there is still room for further interest rate hikes.
data.description: The Bank of Japan's new estimate of its natural interest rate suggests that the central bank still has considerable room to raise interest rates. The new data indicates that the neutral interest rate may be between 1.1% and 2.5%, while the bank's current policy rate is 0.75%. In its report on Friday, the bank stated that many of the indicators used in the latest estimate suggest that interest rates will gradually rise. This means that the upper limit of the neutral interest rate could be further increased, thus providing the Bank of Japan with greater room for further rate hikes. (Jinshi)

data.title: Machi Big Brother deposited $500,000 into Hyperliquid to increase his long positions.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Machi Dage (0x020c...5872) has deposited another $500,000 USDC into Hyperliquid to increase his long positions in ETH and BTC. His current positions are as follows: a 40x BTC long position worth $540,000 (opened at $67,932); a 25x ETH long position worth $6,240,000 (opened at $2,062); and a 10x HYOE long position worth $345,000 (opened at $38.88).

data.title: Significant USDC Deposit Made to HyperLiquid for Leveraged ETH Position
data.description: On March 27, a substantial deposit of 500,000 USDC was made to HyperLiquid, according to BlockBeats On-chain Detection. The deposit was used to increase the leverage on an existing 25x ETH long position. This move highlights ongoing strategies in the cryptocurrency market, where traders are utilizing centralized exchanges (CEX) to manage leveraged positions.

data.title: US Senators Propose Bill to Restrict Federal Officials from Trading on Insider Information
data.description: Four U.S. senators have introduced legislation aimed at prohibiting federal officials from engaging in trading prediction market contracts based on material nonpublic information. According to NS3.AI, the proposed bill includes a minimum fine of $500 for any violations. The legislation targets a range of officials, including the president, vice president, members of Congress, staffers, political appointees, and agency employees, whether they trade on U.S. or foreign platforms. Additionally, any trades exceeding $250 would require reporting within 30 days. A companion bill in the House seeks to extend these restrictions to include the spouses and dependents of the officials.

data.title: Renren Skill Launches AI Skill Store Beta for Chinese Users
data.description: Renren Skill has introduced a public beta version of its AI skill store, specifically designed for Chinese users. Future updates are expected to incorporate tipping and monetization features, enhancing user engagement and potential revenue streams.

data.title: In the past hour, over $53 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network, with over $35 million in liquidations occurring with Bitcoin alone.

Among them, $35.348 million in BTC positions were liquidated and $5.537 million in ETH positions were liquidated.

data.title: LS Cable & System Plans Security Token Initiative for Copper and Rare Earths
data.description: LS Cable & System is preparing to enter the security token market with a focus on copper and rare earths, aiming to liquidate over 1 trillion won ($725 million) in raw material assets. According to NS3.AI, the company intends to launch this initiative alongside the introduction of a legal framework for security tokens expected next year. LS Cable & System believes that enhanced liquidity could facilitate investment in projects like new factory construction.

data.title: Hong Kong Property Prices Show Mixed Trends Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
The latest Centaline City Leading Index (CCL), which reflects the trend of Hong Kong's secondary property prices, recorded a slight decline of 0.11% to 150.88. According to RTHK, Centaline Property noted that the escalation of tensions in the Middle East has led to a drop in Hong Kong stocks and increased financial market volatility. Despite this, the CCL remains at its second-highest level in over two years, with a cumulative increase of 4.7% since the beginning of the year.

The price indices for large housing estates and small to medium-sized units both fell by approximately 0.2% week-on-week, ending a two-week upward trend. In contrast, the index for large units rose by 0.2%, marking a three-week consecutive increase.

Property prices across different regions showed varied developments. In the New Territories West and Kowloon, prices decreased by 0.5% and 1% respectively, while the New Territories East and Hong Kong Island saw increases of 0.2% and 0.9% respectively.

Centaline Property indicated that the recent fall of the Hang Seng Index below the 25,000-point mark, the one-month Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rate (HIBOR) dropping below 2%, and the introduction of HIBOR-linked mortgage plans by small and medium-sized banks with a rate of H+0.6% are expected to impact secondary property prices starting in April.

data.description: On Mar 27, 2026, 08:36 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 68,000 USDT and is now trading at 67,932.171875 USDT, with a narrowed 2.79% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: WTI crude oil rose 2.00% intraday, reaching $96 per barrel.
data.description: Gate data shows that WTI crude oil rose 2.00% intraday, reaching $96 per barrel.

data.title: WTI Crude Oil Prices Surge by 2% to Exceed $96 Per Barrel
data.description: WTI crude oil prices have experienced a significant increase, rising by 2% to surpass $96 per barrel. According to Odaily, this development marks a notable shift in the oil market, reflecting changes in supply and demand dynamics. The rise in prices is attributed to various factors influencing the global oil industry, including geopolitical tensions and production adjustments. This surge in WTI crude oil prices highlights the ongoing volatility in the energy sector.

data.title: RootData Sees Surge in Project Participation with New Feature
data.description:
RootData has experienced a significant increase in project participation since launching its project claim feature. According to ChainCatcher, over 15 well-known projects, including Unitas, Sign, Block Street, USDD, Axis Robotics, and Huma Finance, have joined this week alone, enhancing transparency and boosting visibility. Currently, more than 110 projects are part of RootData.

The project claim feature allows teams to manage and update project information directly on dedicated pages. This includes details such as token economic models, investors, team members, and calendar events, improving the accuracy and comprehensiveness of information. Projects benefit from more precise and higher-quality exposure through RootData and its network of over 220 data partners.
